summary: Iteration 77 - Verified fixes for trilingual translation (Arabic/English/Kurdish) on login page and language persistence after login. Both issues from iteration 76 have been successfully resolved.

kurdish.note: Kurdish translations now working correctly after duplicate entries fix in autoTranslate.js

fixes_verified.issue: 603 duplicate entries in autoTranslate.js overwriting Kurdish translations
fixes_verified.verification: Kurdish texts (ئیمەیل, وشەی نهێنی, چوونەژوورەوە) now display correctly on login page

fixes_verified.issue: CurrencyContext.js overwriting language selection from API
fixes_verified.verification: Language selection persists after login - localStorage app_language maintains user's choice

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All translation and persistence tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: All trilingual translation issues have been resolved. Login page correctly displays Arabic, English, and Kurdish translations. Language selection persists after login without being overwritten by tenant settings API.
